---
title: "VueGen: Automating the creation of scientific reports"
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the Bioinformatics Open Source Conference (BOSC) 2025 (as part of ISMB/ECCB 2025) at Liverpool, United Kingdom.
date: "2025-07-21"
image: ISMB2025.png
categories:
  - 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
  - 🗺️Poster presentation 
  - 🛠️Software development
  - 📊Data visualization
  - 🎈Streamlit
  - 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event][event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)][slides]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify uil presentation >}} Poster (English)][poster]{.btn target=_blank}

You can find more details about this project [here][vuegen]. 

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Multiomics-Analytics-Group/vuegen/HEAD/docs/images/logo/vuegen_logo.svg" width="350" title="vuegen_logo">
</p>

[vuegen]: https://sayalaruano.github.io/projects/VueGen/
[event]: https://www.open-bio.org/events/bosc-2025/
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16104896
[poster]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16171594
